fields.title: Approval flow: ask+timeout + rerun tool call with elevated permission
fields.description: Implement approval flow in extension for denied operations: never->deny; ask->blocking prompt (60s, notify-send if available) then rerun tool call once with elevated permission (fs or net) for this call only; on-failure->prompt only when likely policy-related. Headless/RPC: deny. DoD: unit tests for decision logic + manual QA.
fields.close_reason: Implemented approval flow: ask→prompt before bash, on-failure→prompt after sandbox error, never→deny. Added --approval-policy CLI flag. Timeout configurable via settings.
